title: Cobblemon: Aether Expansion
description: An Aether integration datapack for Cobblemon, adding new structures and regional variants.
body:
This pack expands on the Aether support provided by base Cobblemon

### Regional Variants

Roggenrola Line\
-Now themed around the gravitite ore found in the Aether\
-Gains the Psychic type and Levitate ability

Bonsly Line\
-Themed around the Aether's golden oak trees\
-Gains the Steel type and the Good as Gold ability

### Structures

Aether Gimmigoul Tower\
-New variant of a Gimmigoul Tower in the Aether\
-Can generate anywhere in the Aether\
-Contains the usual loot from other towers

### Additional Changes

Aether Pokédex\
-Showcases all the Pokémon available in the Aether\
-Regional forms have their own entries

Aether Berries added to fishing bait

Additional spawn detail presets\
-Allows for more spawns to made for exisitng or custom Pokémon using Aether blocks\
-Gravitite and Golden Oak presets are used by the two new variants as an example
